raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "California will be the first state to require firearms used by law enforcement to include microstamping technology.",
    "Microstamping technology imprints unique markings onto individual firearms and discharged bullet casings.",
    "Microstamping technology allows law enforcement to connect fired casings to a particular firearm.",
    "Microstamping technology is reliable, feasible, inexpensive, and valuable to criminal investigations.",
    "The rate of unsolved firearm assaults and homicides has increased over the past 40 years.",
